reviews.review_description: This game changed me emotionally from its graphics to the esteem gameplay it is an all around ten. I found this game at a low point in my life, my husband of 13 years had just passed away and I was at an all time low. I needed something to get me through this state of depression and happened to stumble across this game and it changed my life. This game helped me turn my life around and was the reason I started rehab. Thank you so much to the maker of this game as you are the reason I turned my life around. In memory of Gregg
I live for this game. This game is life.
